title: Information Security Governance
description: Risk of inadequate security governance including missing policies, unclear roles, lack of management commitment, and insufficient resource allocation for information security

title: External Parties & Threat Intelligence
description: Risk of inadequate relationships with authorities, security communities, and threat intelligence sources leading to delayed incident reporting and missed early warnings

title: Security in Projects & Change
description: Risk of security not being integrated into project management and change processes, leading to vulnerabilities in new systems and changes

title: Asset Management
description: Risk of unknown, unmanaged, or improperly classified information assets including shadow IT, missing inventory, and inadequate asset lifecycle management

title: Data Classification & Handling
description: Risk of sensitive data not being properly classified, labeled, or handled throughout its lifecycle including transfer, storage, and deletion

title: Identity & Access Management
description: Risk of unauthorized access due to weak authentication, excessive privileges, orphaned accounts, or inadequate access reviews

title: Third-Party & Supply Chain
description: Risk from third-party relationships including vendor data breaches, supply chain software compromise, and vendor access abuse

title: Cloud Security
description: Risk of cloud-specific threats including misconfiguration, identity compromise, shared responsibility gaps, and insecure cloud service usage

title: Personnel Security Lifecycle
description: Risk from inadequate personnel security including insufficient screening, missing employment terms, and insecure termination processes

title: Security Awareness & Culture
description: Risk of human error and social engineering due to inadequate security awareness training, poor reporting culture, and lack of accountability

title: Remote & Mobile Working
description: Risk from remote working arrangements including insecure home networks, unmanaged devices, and lack of remote work policies

title: Physical Security
description: Risk of unauthorized physical access to facilities, secure areas, and equipment including inadequate perimeters, entry controls, and monitoring

title: Environmental Security
description: Risk of environmental threats to information processing facilities including fire, flood, power failure, and inadequate supporting utilities

title: Equipment Security
description: Risk related to equipment including theft, improper disposal, media handling, and maintenance failures

title: Endpoint Security
description: Risk from endpoints including unmanaged devices, BYOD, inadequate controls, and USB-based threats

title: Malware & Ransomware
description: Risk of malware infection including ransomware, cryptominers, and other malicious code impacting confidentiality, integrity, and availability

title: Network Security
description: Risk of network-based attacks including inadequate segmentation, insecure services, and lack of web filtering

title: Vulnerability Management
description: Risk of exploitation of technical vulnerabilities including unpatched systems, zero-days, and configuration weaknesses

title: Secure Development Lifecycle
description: Risk of insecure software development including missing security requirements, insecure coding, and inadequate testing

title: Application Security
description: Risk of application-level vulnerabilities including vulnerable dependencies, source code exposure, and outsourced development issues

title: Cryptographic Failures
description: Risk of cryptographic weaknesses including weak algorithms, poor key management, and inadequate encryption implementation

title: Logging & Monitoring
description: Risk of inadequate security monitoring including missing logs, lack of SIEM, and inability to detect security events

title: Incident Management
description: Risk of inadequate incident management including poor planning, ineffective response, and failure to learn from incidents

title: Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery
description: Risk of inability to recover from disruptions including failed backups, inadequate DR planning, and untested recovery procedures

title: Compliance & Legal
description: Risk of non-compliance with legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements including privacy violations, IP issues, and audit failures
